steps.t: Metal scrap can be found in Orkish encampments near the Causeway Forts in Pelennor. You should collect metal scrap for Aglarang.
Aglarang can be found outside the Smiths' Fellow-hall on the Third Circle of Minas Tirith. You should bring the metal scrap to Aglarang.
The Forges of Cirion can be found near the Smiths' Fellow-hall on the Third Circle of Minas Tirith. You should bring the metal scrap to to the Forges …
Aglarang can be found outside the Smiths' Fellow-hall on the Third Circle of Minas Tirith. You should speak to Aglarang.
